decision-tree.root-question: Are knowledge-graph cross-references core to the access pattern?

branch.question: Does the team already use GraphQL tooling?

branch.conclusion: Use Weaviate. Apply r1, r2, r3, r4, r5.
Use Weaviate but budget for GraphQL learning, OR fall back to Qdrant + manual graph traversal in app code.

branch.question: Native hybrid (vector + BM25) without client fusion?

branch.conclusion: Use Weaviate Hybrid OR Qdrant with sparse vectors — benchmark both on the eval set.
Skip Weaviate. Qdrant offers stronger payload-filter perf without GraphQL.

example.p: Author / Document / Topic graph with hybrid retrieval, team uses GraphQL → Weaviate v4 with cross-refs + native Hybrid.
